label: Attachment & Early Socio-Emotional Development
description: Early work on attachment, parental representation, self-regulation, and the socio-emotional worlds of toddlers and young children.

label: Maltreatment, Risk & Psychopathology
description: Developmental psychopathology, child maltreatment, trauma exposure, violence, and pathways into or away from harm.

label: Poverty, Families & Social Policy
description: Neighborhood poverty, material hardship, cash transfer policy, welfare reform, and the public conditions shaping child development.

label: School Climate, SEL & Intervention Design
description: School-based intervention, social-emotional learning, classroom climate, translational research, and scale.

label: Conflict, Crisis, Refugees & Global Development
description: Learning, resilience, and development in conflict-affected, crisis-affected, and low-resource settings across the globe.
